title: Research Studies. The Department, in coordination with other relevant
content: 15 entities, shall conduct periodic research and studies on labor supply, especially as it 16 relates to the monitoring of the supply of seafarers vis-à-vis the demand for them in 17 international shipping; and conduct strategic studies and researches in support of the 18 decent employment, protection of rights, and promotion of the welfare of seafarers, 19 including the empowerment of women seafarers, among others. 20 21
